scriptDesc: Install the Proton VPN Windows client via Chocolatey, with optional official-installer fallback and full registry/shortcut cleanup on uninstall

messages.checking: Checking for existing Proton VPN install...
messages.notFound: Proton VPN not found -- will install via Chocolatey
messages.verifyFailed: Install completed but ProtonVPN.exe was not found in any expected location -- choco package layout may have changed
messages.fallbackDisabled: Fallback disabled in config -- aborting after Chocolatey failure (set protonvpn.fallback.enabled=true and a current url to enable)
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.cleanupSkipped: Post-uninstall cleanup disabled in config -- skipping registry + shortcut sweep
messages.cleanupStart: Sweeping leftover Proton VPN registry keys + shortcuts...
messages.cleanupSummary: Cleanup summary -- registry: {regRemoved} removed / {regMissing} clean / {regFailed} failed; shortcuts: {scRemoved} removed / {scMissing} clean / {scFailed} failed
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.

commands.uninstall: Uninstall Proton VPN, sweep registry + shortcuts, remove tracking
commands.reinstall: Uninstall then install (use bare dispatcher: .\run.ps1 reinstall protonvpn)
